title: Multiple ITS control introduction for level change (two-stage)
text: basic example shows solve common problem two‑stage interrupted time series control, level (step) change hypothesis. Background: MetroBike City RiverCycle District operate bicycle‑sharing networks neighbouring urban areas. systems use similar bicycles, comparable ridership patterns, maintain similar maintenance schedules. early 2023, MetroBike City implemented two sequential interventions aimed reducing weekly maintenance incidents (e.g., damaged gears, brake faults, electronic lock failures). RiverCycle District made fleet-wide changes period serves control. example illustrates scenario intervention leads significant immediate “step” decrease number maintenance incidents, without slope changes.

title: Multiple ITS control introduction for level change (two-stage)
text: Objective: Reduce lock‑related maintenance tickets. Start Date: April 3, 2023 Duration: 2 months Description: MetroBike bicycles received new smart‑locks improved sensors, reducing jammed/failed locking events. Measurement: Weekly total maintenance incidents.

title: Multiple ITS control introduction for level change (two-stage)
text: Objective: Reduce mechanical faults early detection. Start Date: June 5, 2023 Duration: 2 months Description: operator introduced AI‑supported predictive system identifying bicycles likely require maintenance breakdowns occur. Measurement: Weekly total maintenance incidents.

text: function modifies various components gls object, including: Coefficients Variable names matrices (e.g., variance-covariance) Terms factors used model Predicted variables renamed terms model output specifically tailored better describe parameters models, control pilot group slopes interventions. function provides meaningful names models replacing default coefficient names : (Intercept) becomes "Control y-axis intercept" x becomes "Pilot y-axis intercept difference control" time_index becomes "Control pre-intervention slope" x:time_index becomes "Pilot pre-intervention slope difference control" Additional terms 3 interventions automatically renamed, reflecting intervention-related slopes control pilot groups.
